stages.purpose: Resolve the authoritative organization and reject the secondary distractor.

arguments.query: site:alder-energy.fixture 2025 power supply report renewable share

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization to locate the relevant primary source.
Fetch the primary document instead of answering from its snippet.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Report exactly 37.2 percent and cite the fetched cooperative report.
Do not round the figure or infer emissions reductions.

prompt: Identify the official energy cooperative serving Alder Plain, then fetch its primary 2025 power-supply report and state the renewable share exactly as reported. Do not infer emissions reductions or round the percentage.

results.title: Official site — Alder Plain Energy Cooperative

search_2.query: site:alder-energy.fixture 2025 power supply report renewable share

fetch_1.title: 2025 Power Supply Report
fetch_1.content: Renewable resources supplied 37.2 percent of member electricity in 2025. The report does not calculate avoided emissions.
